logs.message: DjoppieInventory.API depends on Azure.Identity (>= 1.14.3) but Azure.Identity 1.14.3 was not found. Azure.Identity 1.15.0 was resolved instead.
DjoppieInventory.API depends on Microsoft.Identity.Web (>= 3.6.3) but Microsoft.Identity.Web 3.6.3 was not found. Microsoft.Identity.Web 3.7.0 was resolved instead.
